title: DHSC: ministerial gifts, hospitality, travel and meetings, July to September 2024
body: "The Department of Health and Social Care publishes details of ministers’ meetings with external organisations, gifts (given and received), hospitality and overseas travel on a quarterly basis.  Under the new Ministerial Code, from 5 July 2024 onwards, ministers’ gifts and hospitality data are being published by the Cabinet Office as part of a central Register of Ministers’ Gifts and Hospitality. As such, data on gifts and hospitality from 1 to 4 July 2024 is included in this DHSC publication, alongside data on meetings and travel for July to September 2024. "
